definition: Ready to face and endure danger or pain.
sentence_context: The brave firefighter saved the cat.

definition: A sudden upsetting or surprising event.
sentence_context: The news came as a complete shock.

definition: Material consisting of threads twisted together.
sentence_context: I used a piece of string to tie the box.

definition: A very large marine mammal.
sentence_context: We saw a whale breaching in the ocean.

definition: To move with a smooth continuous motion.
sentence_context: The birds glide through the air.

definition: To move on ice or a smooth surface using skates.
sentence_context: I like to skate at the rink.

definition: A feeling of deep pleasure or satisfaction derived from one's own achievements.
sentence_context: He took great pride in his work.

definition: To pursue in order to catch or overtake.
sentence_context: The dog likes to chase squirrels.

definition: A pleased, kind, or amused facial expression.
sentence_context: She had a bright smile on her face.

definition: The visible vapor and gases given off by a burning substance.
sentence_context: Smoke rose from the chimney.

definition: The darkest color.
sentence_context: He wore a black suit.

definition: To come to a place with someone or something.
sentence_context: Do not forget to bring your umbrella.

definition: A mechanical or electrical device for measuring time.
sentence_context: The clock on the wall says it is noon.

definition: A one-piece garment for a woman or girl.
sentence_context: She wore a beautiful blue dress.

definition: A wind instrument made from a tube with holes.
sentence_context: She plays the flute in the band.

definition: A hard, brittle substance, typically transparent.
sentence_context: The window is made of glass.

definition: Vegetation consisting of short plants with long narrow leaves.
sentence_context: The grass was green and soft.

definition: A powered flying vehicle with fixed wings.
sentence_context: The plane flew over the mountains.

definition: A long limbless reptile.
sentence_context: The snake slithered through the grass.

definition: Hard solid nonmetallic mineral matter.
sentence_context: He threw a stone into the pond.

definition: An implement with a handle and bristles.
sentence_context: Use a brush to paint the fence.

definition: A sudden loud noise as of something breaking.
sentence_context: I heard a loud crash in the kitchen.

definition: A liquid that can be swallowed.
sentence_context: I would like a cold drink.

definition: A sudden brief burst of bright light.
sentence_context: A flash of lightning lit up the sky.

definition: A small juicy fruit growing in clusters.
sentence_context: I ate a sweet purple grape.

definition: A flat dish from which food is eaten.
sentence_context: Put the sandwich on your plate.

definition: A condition of body and mind that typically recurs for several hours every night.
sentence_context: I need to get some sleep.

definition: Of a size that is less than normal.
sentence_context: The mouse is very small.

definition: An implement consisting of a small shallow bowl on a long handle.
sentence_context: Eat your soup with a spoon.

definition: A large motor vehicle for transporting goods.
sentence_context: The truck was carrying a load of wood.

definition: Food made of flour, water, and yeast.
sentence_context: I am baking a loaf of bread.

definition: A visible mass of condensed water vapor floating in the atmosphere.
sentence_context: A fluffy white cloud was in the sky.

definition: A series of thoughts, images, and sensations occurring in a person's mind during sleep.
sentence_context: I had a strange dream last night.

definition: Recently made or obtained.
sentence_context: These eggs are very fresh.

definition: Of the color between blue and yellow.
sentence_context: The leaves are green in summer.

definition: A thing given as a reward to the winner.
sentence_context: He won first prize in the contest.

definition: A flat length of wood or other rigid material attached to a wall.
sentence_context: Put the book back on the shelf.

definition: Past tense of spend.
sentence_context: I spent all my money on candy.

definition: To have or maintain an upright position.
sentence_context: Please stand up when your name is called.

definition: Having the pleasant taste characteristic of sugar.
sentence_context: This candy is very sweet.
